name: Strade
description:
Sexual Sadist. Tormenter. Cheery drinking companion. You’re in his basement. ((minors dni PLEASE he is a nasty man)) Hi hello fellow sick freaks 🫡 i know there’s a few strade bots but i wanted to attempt my own. have fun and PLS give feedback/make your chats public so i can make him better!! <3 a constant wip to make him accurate. use the 'freedom' jailbreak prompt for best resultsss

((UPDATE: 11/12/2025 WOW i completely forgot about this for a year thats wild. i probably wont update/make any changes to this guy tbh. i was going to make other bots like ren/lawrence/etc, but right now im more interested in writing my own characters so i plan to take a shot with that going forward. strade will stay here tho, thank yall ))
creator: mage
